strategy: Team fight — 19,200 health plus Tzeltan Cohorts. Hit with Myth or Life (+35%); never Storm into her 80% resist.

Work in 5-round windows: at the end of every 5th round she cleanses every negative ward off herself and mass-prisms your whole team into a random school. Traps go on early in the window; the hit lands before the round-5 reset.
No Deathblades from anyone — she Disarms them and answers with Virulent Plague.
Feints get counter-Feinted onto the caster — if you Feint her, hit the same round or shield the Feinted wizard immediately.
Any kill — a Cohort or a teammate — triggers her Berserk while surviving minions Fortify. Clear the Cohorts early, shield through the spike, then set up the boss window.
If the fight crosses a round-5 prism, check what school your damage now converts to before committing the big hit.
cheatNotes: Any Deathblade — even one a Cohort puts on her — gets Disarmed off and answered with Virulent Plague (-healing on your team). Keep Death charms out of team decks.
Every defeat on either side makes her cast Berserk while remaining minions Fortify — expect a damage spike the round after anything dies; pre-shield when you kill a Cohort.
Feint her and she Feints you back — a +70% trap on your head with minions up is dangerous. Feint only on the same round as the hit, or shield the marked wizard.

End of every 5th round she cleanses all negative wards off her team and casts a mass Storm prism that converts your incoming damage to a random school — traps placed on round 5 are wasted, and post-prism hits may change school. Set up and strike inside each 5-round window.
